name: Meal Planner
description: Personal meal planning, recipe management, and grocery list generation. Single-repo domain: Rust Axum API + CLI plus a React/TanStack frontend served from the same repo.

repositories.name: meal-planner
repositories.notes: Workspace contains both the Rust backend (src/, tests/) and the frontend (frontend/). Profile declares two working_roots.

shared_conventions.testing_philosophy: Integration tests in tests/ exercise services and API end-to-end via sqlx + axum::test.
notes: Zero-warning policy: cargo clippy must pass with -D warnings.
Use thiserror for errors; prefer ? over .unwrap() in library code.
No ORM — services call sqlx with raw SQL.

external_dependencies.name: TheMealDB
external_dependencies.notes: Optional source for seed recipes. Not required for local dev.

external_dependencies.name: SQLite
external_dependencies.notes: Default backend. The sqlx layer is Postgres-ready; placeholders would need ? → $N translation.
